mapper.select: select c.id, c.user_id, ifnull(u.username, '') as username, ifnull(u.username, '') as nickname, ifnull(u.avatar, '') as avatar, c.parent_id, null as parent_user_id, '' as parent_nickname, c.content, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time from osh_comment c inner join osh_comment_relation cr on cr.comment_id = c.id and cr.biz_type = #{bizType} and cr.biz_id = #{courseId} left join osh_user u on u.id = c.user_id where c.status = 1 and (c.parent_id = 0 or c.parent_id is null) order by c.create_time asc, c.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into osh_comment ( user_id, parent_id, content, like_count, reply_count, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{comment.userId}, #{comment.parentId}, #{comment.content}, #{comment.likeCount}, #{comment.replyCount}, #{comment.status}, now(), now() )
insert into osh_comment_relation ( comment_id, biz_type, biz_id, create_time ) values ( #{commentId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, now() )
mapper.update: update osh_comment set reply_count = ifnull(reply_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: select c.id, c.user_id, ifnull(u.username, '') as username, ifnull(u.username, '') as nickname, ifnull(u.avatar, '') as avatar, c.parent_id, p.user_id as parent_user_id, ifnull(pu.username, '') as parent_nickname, c.content, c.like_count, c.reply_count, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time from osh_comment c left join osh_user u on u.id = c.user_id left join osh_comment p on p.id = c.parent_id left join osh_user pu on pu.id = p.user_id where c.id = #{commentId} limit 1
